testcase.name: tc02

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (988, 452). Other element would receive the click:
(Session info: chrome=140.0.7339.81) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [0aa4bfd85b5d84f46241fa897ec95fdf, clickElement {id=f.43C541110E485CBC533D57B85E95A7C5.d.15319BE336496A7B492A5FBC03D20221.e.2458}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 140.0.7339.81, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 140.0.7339.82 (bc93617e21c3..., userDataDir: C:\Users\jainu\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62146}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62146/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 140.0.7339.81, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (0aa4bfd85b5d84f46241fa897ec95fdf)] -> xpath: (//*[@tabindex='0'])[9]] Session ID: 0aa4bfd85b5d84f46241fa897ec95fdf

testcase.error:
